info.title: Muntur API v2.0
info.description: Comprehensive API documentation for the Muntur backend system. Includes endpoints for users, garages, discussions, messages, forums, ratings, and notifications.

post.summary: Send a message and get AI response
post.description: Sends a message in a discussion. If the discussion does not exist, it creates one. Then automatically generates an AI response and returns it.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this country.

get.summary: Obtenir le profil d'un utilisateur par ID

post.description: Permet à un utilisateur de se connecter avec ses identifiants classiques.
Permet à un nouvel utilisateur de s'inscrire. Crée également un profil et un pocket par défaut.
Permet à l'utilisateur authentifié de changer son mot de passe en fournissant l'ancien et le nouveau.

200.description: Mot de passe changé avec succès

put.summary: Mettre à jour son propre profil utilisateur
Mettre à jour un utilisateur par ID

delete.description: Deletes the specified comment if it belongs to the authenticated user.

get.summary: API endpoint for managing discussions between users.
get.description:
- `list`: Retrieve all discussions (admin/global access)
- `retrieve`: Get a single discussion by ID
- `create`: Create a new discussion
- `update` / `partial_update`: Modify an existing discussion
- `delete`: Delete a discussion
- `my_discussions`: Custom endpoint returning discussions involving the current user

post.summary: API endpoint for managing discussions between users.
post.description:
- `list`: Retrieve all discussions (admin/global access)
- `retrieve`: Get a single discussion by ID
- `create`: Create a new discussion
- `update` / `partial_update`: Modify an existing discussion
- `delete`: Delete a discussion
- `my_discussions`: Custom endpoint returning discussions involving the current user

get.description: Returns all discussions that include the authenticated user's profile. Each discussion includes the number of unread messages.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer authentication token

200.description: A list of discussions where the authenticated user participates

parameters.name: id

post.description: API endpoint for managing FAQs.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying this faq.

post.description: API endpoint for managing Forums.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying this forum.

get.description: Returns all messages associated with a specific forum, with pagination support.

parameters.name: forum_id
parameters.description: ID of the forum to retrieve messages for

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination

200.description: List of messages for the specified forum

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying this forum.

post.description: API endpoint for managing garages.
Returns garages near a given latitude/longitude, optionally filtered by a keyword or maximum distance in km. Results are sorted by distance.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying this garage.

post.description: Attach one or multiple media files to a specific garage.

medias.description: List of media files to attach

parameters.name: garage_id
parameters.description: ID of the garage to attach media to

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying this garage.

post.description: Allows an authenticated user to rate a specific garage. If the user has already rated this garage, the previous rating will be updated.

parameters.name: garage_id
parameters.description: ID of the garage to rate

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying this garage.

post.description: API endpoint for managing Infos.

get.description: Returns all infos available to the authenticated user. with pagination in the url.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer authentication token

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination

200.description: List of infos for the authenticated user

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying this info.

post.description: Adds a new comment to the specified info.

parameters.name: info_id
parameters.description: ID of the info to add the comment to

201.description: Comment created and added to info

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying this info.

post.description: Adds or updates a reaction to the specified info.

type.description: Type of reaction (e.g., like, love, etc.)

parameters.name: info_id
parameters.description: ID of the info to add the reaction to

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying this info.

get.description: Returns all comments associated with a specific info, with pagination support.

parameters.name: info_id
parameters.description: ID of the info to retrieve comments for

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination

200.description: List of comments for the specified info

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying this info.

post.description: API endpoint for managing Medias.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying this media.

post.description: API endpoint for managing messages.
Marks a message as archived. Archived messages are hidden from standard queries.

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: ID of the message to archive

post.description: Adds a new message to the specified discussion.

parameters.name: discussion_id
parameters.description: ID of the discussion to add the message to

201.description: Message created and added to discussion

post.description: Adds a new message to the specified forum.

parameters.name: forum_id
parameters.description: ID of the forum to add the message to

201.description: Message created and added to forum

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying this message.

post.description: API endpoint for managing notifications.

get.description: Returns all notifications that concern the authenticated user. These notifications are those linked directly to their profile or targeted by a filter (city, country, gender, etc.).

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Bearer authentication token

200.description: List of notifications for the authenticated user

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A UUID string identifying this notification.

post.description:
Available actions:
  - create: Create a new profile
  - retrieve: Retrieve a profile by ID
  - update/partial_update: Modify an existing profile
  - my_profile: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile
  - update_photo: Update the authenticated user's profile photo

get.description: Retrieve the profile of the currently authenticated user.

404.description: Profile not found for the authenticated user

delete.summary: Delete a reaction to a comment
delete.description: Deletes the reaction of the authenticated user to the specified comment.

delete.summary: Delete a reaction to an info
delete.description: Deletes the reaction of the authenticated user to the specified info.

username.title: Nom d’utilisateur
username.description: Requis. 150 caractères maximum. Uniquement des lettres, nombres et les caractères « @ », « . », « + », « - » et « _ ».

groups.description: Les groupes dont fait partie cet utilisateur. Celui-ci obtient tous les droits de tous les groupes auxquels il appartient.

items.title: Groupes
items.description: Les groupes dont fait partie cet utilisateur. Celui-ci obtient tous les droits de tous les groupes auxquels il appartient.

filter.title: Filter
filter.description: Type de filtre pour la notification (ex: pays, ville, etc.)

filter_value.title: Filter value
filter_value.description: Valeur du filtre pour la notification (ex: France, Paris, etc.)
